case_title: KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. VS. VERNON APPLEGATE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,262.45 FILED BY KING AMERICA AMBULANCE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT APPLEGATE, VERNON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-23-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BY PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOHN LEGASPI--COMMUNITY RELATIONS--PUBLIC INFO. OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
